prestazioni: Twin-turbocharged **VG30DETT** (3.0L V6, 24v DOHC) with **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbos (60mm compressor, 56mm turbine) on **Tial MV-R 44mm** wastegates, paired with **HKS GT-SS** intercoolers (76mm core thickness) and **GReddy Type-S** blow-off valves for 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) boost targeting 550whp on **E85** with **Nistune Type 3** standalone ECU (ROM expansion for full sequential injection control)

**JUN Type 3** forged internals (9.5:1 CR pistons, **Manley** H-beam rods, **Crower** billet crank) with **Ferrea** 5000-series intake/exhaust valves, **Tomei** Type-B camshafts (264°/260° duration, 10.8mm/10.2mm lift), and **BCA** titanium retainers for 8,500 RPM redline

**Tomei** 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust with **Spoon Sports** 4-2-1 headers (1.75-inch primaries, 3-inch collectors) and **Magnaflow** 76mm mufflers, paired with **Walbro 450 LPH** dual fuel pumps and **ID1000** injectors (side-feed, 1000cc/min) for E85 compatibility
estetica: **Veilside Fortune 99** widebody conversion (Z32-specific, 3-piece FRP overfenders, 100mm rear stretch) with **Rocket Bunny** GTW-01 front bumper (carbon fiber, Z32-specific tow hook delete) and **Seibon** carbon fiber hood (dual NACA ducts, 30% weight reduction)

**Work Meister S1 3P** 18x10.5 +30 (front) / 18x12 +20 (rear) wheels with **Toyo R888R** 275/35/18 (front) and **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** 315/30/18 (rear) tires, paired with **BC Racing BR Type-ZR** coilovers (32-way damping, Swift springs) and **Cusco** 22mm front / 18mm rear sway bars

**RE Amemiya** GT-II rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,200mm span, 3D-printed aluminum mounts) with **Voltex** Type-3 front lip (Z32-specific, 3-piece carbon) and **J's Racing** side skirts (polyurethane, OEM+ fitment), finished in **House of Kolor** Kandy Apple Red over **PPG DBC base**
